name: George Burns
bio: George Burns was an American comedian, actor, and singer whose career successfully spanned vaudeville, radio, film, and television. With his wife Gracie Allen he formed the celebrated comedy duo Burns and Allen, and after her death he reinvented himself at age 79 as a cigar-wielding comic elder statesman, winning an Academy Award for The Sunshine Boys.

timeline.ev: Marries Gracie Allen; forms the duo Burns and Allen
The George Burns and Gracie Allen Show debuts on television
Gracie Allen dies; Burns continues solo
Wins Best Supporting Actor Oscar for The Sunshine Boys
Dies in Beverly Hills at age 100

accolades: Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor, The Sunshine Boys (1975)
Grammy Award for Best Spoken Word recording
Star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame
